tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose control or possible diabetes, and high total and LDL cholesterol, suggesting increased cardiovascular risk. Carbon dioxide is slightly low, which may reflect mild metabolic acidosis or respiratory compensation. Renal function, electrolytes, and triglycerides are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation and management of glycemic control and dyslipidemia.

display.value: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
